mapper.select: select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, tsr.owner_id, trul.id as link_id, trul.valid_from, trul.expire_on, trul.status, trul.app_id from t_sys_role tsr join t_role_user_link trul on tsr.role_id = trul.role_id and trul.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, case when trul.user_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_role tsr left join t_role_user_link trul on tsr.role_id = trul.role_id and trul.user_id = #{userId} and trul.is_deleted = 0 where tsr.app_id = #{appId} and tsr.is_deleted = 0

select tsu.username, tsu.nickname, trul.id as link_id, trul.valid_from, trul.expire_on, trul.create_time, trul.app_id, trul.status, trul.app_id from t_sys_user tsu join t_role_user_link trul on tsu.user_id = trul.user_id and trul.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsu.user_id, tsu.username, tsu.nickname, case when trul.role_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user tsu left join t_role_user_link trul on tsu.user_id = trul.user_id and trul.role_id = #{roleId} and trul.app_id = #{appId} and trul.is_deleted = 0 where tsu.is_deleted = 0
